summary: Iteration 96: UI/UX + Backend Enhancement + Production Hardening - ALL TESTS PASSED. Backend: 12/12 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All key features verified via screenshots and JS evaluation.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 96 verified all new features: (1) Sidebar width confirmed at 220px (narrower than before). (2) Dashboard date pickers show actual MTD dates (04/01/2026 to 04/15/2026), NOT empty mm/dd/yyyy. (3) MTD quick-select button has blue highlight styling (bg-blue-500/20 border-blue-500/30 text-blue-300). (4) All 6 KPI cards present: Revenue, Labor Cost, Inventory, Events, Workflows, Forecast. (5) PMS arrivals endpoint returns rooms_ready and rooms_pending counts with room_ready boolean on each arrival. (6) Global exception handler returns JSON for unhandled errors (tested /api/nonexistent). (7) All existing endpoints still working after cleanup (portfolio/dashboard, item-mapping/stats, concierge/outlets). (8) Taskbar dock visible at bottom with icons.
